name: Cross-box (back), small box development
notes: Small box development that completes the slot-and-tongue assembly with piece 29; together they hold the hand wheels in place via the inserted tongue 31+32 (Fig. 4). Plain a/b/c labels on Panel D; b and c reciprocate to piece 29's b₃₀/c₃₀. The plain 'a' tab's counterpart is not documented in Panel D — it likely connects to piece 4 (the front center column) but no a₃₀ subscripted label was transcribed there. Left out of connections pending confirmation in M1 task 1.5. Flange-fold count is approximate.
